steps.text: Record and Report Initial Method Checks as follows:
Calibration and Linearity Check Gas Certifications (sections 7.2 and 7.4 of this method).
Condensate Trap Blank Check (section 8.1.1 of this method).
Pretest Leak-Check (section 8.1.4 of this method).
Condensate Recovery Apparatus (section 10.1.1 of this method).
Carrier Gas and Auxiliary O2 Blank Check (section 10.1.1.1 of this method).
Oxidation Catalyst Efficiency Check (section 10.1.1.2 of this method).
System Performance Check (section 10.1.1.3 of this method).
Oxidation Catalyst Efficiency Check (section 10.1.2.1 of this method).
Reduction Catalyst Efficiency Check (section 10.1.2.2 of this method).
NMO Analyzer Linearity Check Calibration (section 10.1.2.3 of this method).
NMO Analyzer Daily Calibration (section 10.2 of this method).
Condensate Recovery (section 11.1 of this method).
Daily Performance Checks (section 11.1.1 of this method).
Leak-Check (section 11.1.1.1 of this method).
System Background Test (section 11.1.1.2 of this method).
Oxidation Catalyst Efficiency Check (section 11.1.1.3 of this method).
Check, record, and quantify the CD at two concentration values at least once daily.
Introduce the reference gas prior to any sample conditioning or filtration equipment.
Ensure that the reference gas passes through all filters, scrubbers, conditioners, and other monitor components used during normal sampling.
Adjust the CEMS calibration whenever the daily zero (or low-level) CD or the daily high-level CD exceeds two times the limits of the applicable PS’s.
Use equation 1–1 of this method to calculate the accuracy for the RAA.
Select the sampling port location and the number/location of traverse points at the exhaust of the stationary RICE.
Determine the O2 concentration of the stationary RICE exhaust at the sampling port location.

preconditions.text: If demonstrating compliance with the THC percent reduction requirement, measure THC at the inlet and the outlet of the control device.

constraints.text: CO concentration must be at 15 percent O2, dry basis.
